title: X-Wing Rogue Squadron ½

'''''X-Wing Rogue Squadron'' ½''' is a promotional one-shot issue of the [[Star Wars Legends|''Star Wars'' Legends]] [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron]]''. It was written by [[Michael A. Stackpole]] and [[Mike W. Barr]], with art by [[Gary Erskine]], and it features a story set in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], immediately before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]].

The issue was first published in [[February]] [[1997]] by [[Dark Horse Comics]], and it was distributed through [[Wizard Entertainment]]. It was reprinted in [[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Requiem for a Rogue (trade paperback)|''Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Requiem for a Rogue'' trade paperback]] ([[1999]]) and ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: The Other Sons of Tatooine]]'' ([[2012]]). A digital edition was published by [[Marvel Comics]] in [[2015]].

==Publisher's summary==
''Before the Battle of Yavin, the Rogue Squadron gets in a dogfight with TIE fighters. Plus, who is the new member of Rogue Squadron?''

==Plot summary==
The story begins with the members of Rogue Squadron playing [[Sabacc/Legends|sabacc]] in a [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Commenor/Legends|Commenor]]. During the game, [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] receives a card that says "Hangar Bay 31," and the group leaves. As they arrive in the [[Hangar/Legends|hangar]], a group of men try to extort money from them by claiming that they stopped their [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeder]] from being stolen. They quickly attack and disarm the men before meeting up with their contact, [[Nera Dantels]].

After confirming Wedge's code, she leads them to her ship, the ''[[Starduster]]'', and shows them her cargo: several [[Astromech droid/Legends|astromech droids]]. As they leave the [[Planet/Legends|planet]], a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] contacts [[Folor Base]] and informs them that the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] is leaving.

Before Rogue Squadron can make the jump to [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]], they are attacked by a squadron of TIE fighters. The battle starts in their favor, but [[Cesi Eirriss]]' [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] is damaged, and another [[Squadron/Legends|squadron]] of TIE fighters appears. Realizing that there was not enough time to eject and get aboard the ''Starduster'', Eirriss tells Rogue Squadron to jump to hyperspace, and she crashes into the enemy ships.

After completing the hyperspace jump, Rogue Squadron and the ''Starduster'' arrive at [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]] with the astromech [[Droid/Legends|droids]]. Rogue Squadron is then informed that they have a replacement [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]], [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]].
